body_txt: People don't like bullies . People really don't like sexual predators . So what happens when you combine the two ? You get this piece of work. These types of bullies do a lot of the things that regular bullies do, such as beating people up, blackmail , stealing, spreading rumors , extortion, etc. but add sexual crimes on top of it. They might extort their victims for sexual favors , blackmail people via indecent photographs, commit voyeurism , touch people inappropriately, threaten to hurt people's loved ones to get sex , or other sexually immoral acts. Some of these types of bullies might force other people into assisting with their perverted actions by threatening them in some way. One especially favorite activity of these types of bullies is to try to steal other people's (particularly the protagonist's) partners, either by humiliating their victims in front of their partners or by trying to seduce or flirt with the victim's lover . Most of the time, the partner will be repulsed by the bully , but in certain works (particularly the netorare genre) the bully will actually succeed in stealing the partner away. Perverted bullies come in different forms; some are obviously predatory scumbags who barely mask their true nature, while others might put on a mask of respectability to hide their lecherous nature . In regards to their ability to seduce people, some are perfectly capable of getting people to consensually sleep with them , but are still willing to sexually harass and/or rape people out of a sense of entitlement to other people's bodies , pride in their ability to seduce people, or sadism . Other perverted bullies may have no success seducing people, but may or may not be convinced that they're a catch and that the people rejecting them either don't know what they're missing out on or Playing Hard to Get . If the target of their perversions is one of their victims, they might be convinced that the victim is a less worthy partner for their target than themselves. Sub-Trope of Predatory Pervert . If the bully is also one's workplace superior, this is Sexual Predator Boss . This type of bully might either grow up to be or already is a Serial Rapist . May or may not be a Handsome Lech or an Abhorrent Admirer . Overlaps with Attempted Homewrecker if they harass someone else's partner. Compare/Contrast Loving Bully , who is genuinely in love with the target of their bullying, and usually doesn't act perverted towards their crush. Contrast Lovable Sex Maniac , Ethical Slut , Good Bad Girl , Chivalrous Pervert , and Covert Pervert who are all likable perverts that this type of character might be a foil to. Because of the various double standards in regards to rape and gender , most examples of this trope are usually straight guys harassing women, with other gender dynamics usually being Played for Laughs , Fanservice , or romance rather than drama or horror. With many cases crossing over with Loving Bully for this reason. In these cases, Unfortunate Implications will often enter with full force. Indeed, "they hurt you because they like you" might be an excuse from the bully themselves or a third party. He is a strong candidate to be considered a Very Punchable Man , and will often get his comeuppance in the form of a well-aimed foot or knee to the crotch . It's important to note that although Pants-Pulling Prank is considered a form of sexual assault and a fairly common form of bullying, rarely will this form of bullying be seen as a form of sexual bullying in fiction, especially if Played for Laughs . Unfortunately Truth in Television , while these types of people exist in real life, like all Sexual Harassment and Rape Tropes , No Real Life Examples, Please! .
